19:["$","$1","block-21",{"children":["$","p","p-170",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["The fix removes authority-derived PDA validation from ",["$","code","p-170-code-0",{"className":"rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-black/28 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-[0.92em] text-cyan-100","children":"CreateProposal"}]," and keeps proposal creation bound to a program-owned ",["$","code","p-170-code-1",{"className":"rounded-md border border-white/10 bg-black/28 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-[0.92em] text-cyan-100","children":"Dao"}]," account plus governance-token ownership constraints. A regression test now transfers DAO authority and then creates a proposal against the same DAO. A second regression test initializes and transfers the treasury operator authority PDA independently."]}]}]
